info.name: major-project-be
info.description:
Complete API test collection for the AI-Augmented Project & Requirements Management System.

Testing order:
1. Auth (register users, get profile)
2. Projects (create, list, members)
3. Requirements (CRUD, FSM transitions, versioning)
4. Specifications
5. Tasks (CRUD, dependencies, status transitions)
6. Algorithms (CPM, Traceability)
7. AI WBS Generation

Pre-requisite: Set the `baseUrl` collection variable to your server URL.
The collection auto-saves tokens and IDs into variables so tests run in sequence.

item.name: FSM: ILLEGAL jump — Under Analysis → Approved (expect 400)

exec: pm.test('Status 400 — FSM rejects illegal jump', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: Content Edit on Approved — triggers versioning + impact analysis
Re-approve for downstream tests (walk FSM back up)

body.raw:

  "requirement_id": "{{requirementId}}",
  "title": "Set up Supabase Auth tables",
  "description": "Configure auth schema, enable email provider, set JWT secret.",
  "estimated_hours": 2,
  "priority": "high"
}

{
  "requirement_id": "{{requirementId}}",
  "title": "Implement register endpoint",
  "description": "POST /api/auth/register with Zod validation and profile upsert.",
  "estimated_hours": 4,
  "priority": "high"
}

{
  "requirement_id": "{{requirementId}}",
  "title": "Write auth integration tests",
  "description": "Jest tests covering register, login, invalid token, and role checks.",
  "estimated_hours": 3,
  "priority": "medium"
}

item.name: DFS: POST /api/tasks/dependencies — Task2 depends on Task1
DFS: POST /api/tasks/dependencies — Task3 depends on Task2
DFS: CIRCULAR dependency — Task1 depends on Task3 (expect 400)
BFS: PATCH Task1 status → In Progress
BFS: PATCH Task1 status → Done (triggers BFS unblocking of Task2)
PATCH Task1 — Developer can update status
